# Project Brief

## Goal

Build an application that aggregates and structures:

- Old Testament stories
- New Testament stories
- major biblical characters
- probable or traditional locations of events
- artworks inspired by each story

## Current idea

The app should allow users to:

- browse biblical stories
- explore related characters
- see possible locations on a map
- discover artworks inspired by those stories
- later connect artworks to museums, churches, galleries, and collections

## Current data scope

The first dataset includes:

- stories
- characters
- locations
- artworks
- relationship tables between them

## Product direction

This should evolve into a searchable, filterable discovery app for biblical narratives and sacred art.
